name: personal-marketplace
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins — skills, agents, and MCP servers for software development and testing workflows.

plugins.name: code-review-tools
plugins.description: Skills for reviewing, simplifying, and understanding code — PR review, refactoring, source control, and code explanation.

plugins.name: dev-tools
plugins.description: Developer productivity skills — unit test generation for existing code.

plugins.name: sdet-tools
plugins.description: E2E and API test generation from Jira epics, PRs, or QA acceptance criteria — Claude Code agent, Agent SDK loop, and Jira MCP server.

plugins.name: plugin-tools
plugins.description: Tools for building and maintaining Claude Code marketplace plugins — plugin-architect agent and documentation skill.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Challenges a design, plan, or idea using Socratic questioning and devil's-advocate critique to surface hidden assumptions and weaknesses.

plugins.name: api-dev
plugins.description: API development agent for Python/FastAPI projects — TDD, feature implementation, code review, and multi-step agentic workflows.
